scripts.typecheck:vod-export-docs: npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false --strict --skipLibCheck --target ES2022 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --types node scripts/vod-export-docs.ts scripts/vod-export-docs.test.ts
scripts.test:vod-export-docs: npm run typecheck:vod-export-docs && npx tsx scripts/vod-export-docs.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:helpers && npm run test:itunes && npm run test:discord && npm run test:nova-url-safety && npm run test:db && npm run test:song-merge && npm run test:global-works && npm run test:auth && npm run test:authz && npm run test:nova-url-routes && npm run test:youtube-verification && npm run test:vod-export-schema && npm run test:vod-export-core && npm run test:vod-export-source && npm run test:vod-export-json-stream && npm run test:vod-export-api && npm run test:vod-export-publication && npm run test:vod-export-maintenance && npm run test:vod-export-docs && npm run test:vod-export-stress
